content: Soprano B3-G5, Alto G3-C5, Tenor C3-G4, Bass E2-C4. Per Aldwell & Schachter, Harmony and Voice Leading 4th ed. Violation flags are backend-computed JSON only.
Next.js App Router, TypeScript, VexFlow 5, Tone.js 15, Zustand 5, Tailwind 4
Dark: Nocturne palette. Light: Sonata palette. No ad-hoc hex values. No Tailwind color overrides outside the token system.
Frontend: render (VexFlow), schedule (Tone.js), display (Theory Inspector). Backend: constraint-satisfaction, LLM weights, MusicXML persistence.
